Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate' as DiagnosticProcedureDate, Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureOpcs.@code' as DiagnosticProcedureOpcs from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901 where type = 'HN' and NhsNumber is not null and DiagnosticProcedureOpcs is not null and DiagnosticProcedureDate is not null;

Explanation.Description: Procedure date of the diagnostic procedure.
The OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the diagnostic procedure carried out.
